metadata.title: What is OneHealth DataSpace?
metadata.description: One Health multisectoral data space powered by CESGA

header.title: What is OneHealth DataSpace?
header.lead: OneHealth DataSpace is a multisectoral data space powered by CESGA designed to facilitate collaboration between organizations working in human health, animal health, and environmental health.

about.title: What is OneHealth DataSpace?
about.paragraph1: OneHealth DataSpace is a multisectoral data space powered by CESGA designed to facilitate collaboration between organizations working in human health, animal health, and environmental health.
about.paragraph2: Its mission is to turn data into useful knowledge to improve global health through secure data-sharing technologies, artificial intelligence, advanced analytics, and high-performance computing.
about.paragraph3: Participating entities retain control over their data while collaborating on research, innovation, and artificial intelligence projects within an ecosystem based on the One Health approach.
about.paragraph4: More than a data exchange platform, OneHealth DataSpace forms the foundation of the future European AI ecosystem in global health driven by CESGA through the 1HealthAI Factory initiative.

benefits.title: Benefits of the OneHealth DataSpace
benefits.item4: • Generate value from data in a secure way.
benefits.item5: • Access advanced AI and high-performance computing capabilities.
benefits.item6: • Participate in a long-term sustainable European infrastructure.

oneHealth.title: The One Health approach
oneHealth.paragraph1: The One Health concept recognizes that human, animal, and environmental health are interconnected.
oneHealth.paragraph2: Therefore, today’s major challenges — pandemics, antimicrobial resistance, zoonotic diseases, food security, and environmental impact — require knowledge and data sharing across multiple disciplines.
oneHealth.paragraph3: OneHealth DataSpace provides the necessary infrastructure to enable this in a secure and scalable way.

funding.title: OneHealth DataSpace is a project
funding.call: Funded by the European Union – NextGenerationEU.
funding.grant: Through the call of the Ministry for Digital Transformation and Public Function: Demonstrators and Use Cases of Data Spaces. “Sectoral Data Spaces 2023 for the creation of demonstrators and use cases of data-sharing spaces.”
funding.program: The “Sectoral data spaces” program is part of investment 1 of component 12 of the Recovery, Transformation and Resilience Plan, funded through the Recovery and Resilience Mechanism (RRM).
funding.details:
File number: TSI-100120-2024-12
Period: 13-12-2024 – 30-06-2026. Extended to 31 August 2026.
Funded by: Ministry for Digital Transformation and Public Function
Total amount: €3,077,058
